page: OVHcloud r3-512 is a memory-optimized server powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using AMD EPYC Milan processors running at 2.3 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps alongside one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark evaluations, this server demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Memory performance is highly competitive, with small-block read-only memory bandwidth placing in the top 10% and large-block read/write bandwidth in the top 25%. It also excels in high-throughput operations, achieving top-tier results in Redis SET operations and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, alongside strong performance in static web serving and database operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the r3-512 offers high resource density, combining a large memory footprint with dedicated physical cores to maximize compute throughput per allocated resource. This balance of high memory capacity, dedicated AMD EPYC processing power, and fast NVMe storage makes the server well-suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, multi-threaded data processing, and enterprise-grade web serving.
description: OVHcloud r3-512 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC Milan processors at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 20 Gbps baseline network interface. Benchmark data highlights top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core tests, as well as top-tier memory bandwidth for small blocks. The server also demonstrates strong database operations and top-tier Redis SET performance. This configuration provides high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-512 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores, 512 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth for high-throughput database workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores and fast NVMe storage for enterprise database and caching workloads.

512 GB of RAM providing 8 GB of memory per core
Bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD local storage and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
